Hardware Component File

BVR_on_can_X62_v1.9

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference BVR_on_can_X62_v1.9_20090324T150712.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 7E1
Receive ID 7E9
Functional Addr 6E
Functional Name BVA
